tasks.title: Fix SC4 S05 'In delivery' milestone — 375 missing (21% complete)
tasks.description: Largest single volume gap. Investigate why 'In delivery' actual milestone is not being captured for SC4 shipments. Likely carrier EDI mapping issue.

tasks.title: Fix SC4 S45 'Handover to broker' — 115 missing (2.5% complete)
tasks.description: Broker integration appears broken for SC4. Only 3 out of 118 shipments have this milestone. Check broker system interface and EDI message flow.

tasks.title: Fix SC4 S17 milestone — 179 missing, 245 late
tasks.description: 61% completeness and 8% timeliness. Both completeness and timeliness severely impacted. Review S17 trigger conditions and timing.

tasks.title: Investigate ETA 2D accuracy gap — 28.8% vs 75% target
tasks.description: 71% of shipments fail the +/-48h delivery window. Root cause analysis needed on delivery date estimation logic. Focus on SC4 S31 (126 missing, 293 late).

tasks.title: Address SC3 S02 'Collected' timeliness — 0% with 212 late
tasks.description: Carrier pick-up confirmation timestamps are consistently delayed. Work with carriers to improve collection milestone reporting speed.

tasks.title: Fix SC4 S31 'Delivered' timeliness — 11.8% (293 late)
tasks.description: Delivery confirmation arriving well outside SLA window. Cross-check carrier delivery confirmation timestamps with system capture time.

tasks.title: Fix SC3 FCL completeness — stuck at ~52%
tasks.description: SC3 FCL consistently the worst performing segment across all weeks. FCL milestone mapping needs review. 454 milestones missing out of 955 required.

tasks.title: Fix Reference Completeness — stalled at 79% for 5 weeks
tasks.description: Not improving organically. Identify which reference fields are consistently missing (PO, SO, Consignment). Require validation at booking creation.

tasks.title: Implement SLA alerts for late milestones
tasks.description: Set up automated alerts when milestones are not reported within 24h of expected time. Early detection system for timeliness degradation.

tasks.title: Setup task force for individual working groups
tasks.description: Per Bosch requirements: establish dedicated working groups with clear ownership for each KPI area.

tasks.title: Define prioritization and ownership for each action item
tasks.description: Per Bosch requirements: assign clear owners and priorities to all action items in the April target roadmap.

tasks.title: Build PDCA Excel updater script
tasks.description: Automate the PDCA milestone template population from weekly raw data. Writes formulas referencing SC Data sheets for milestone rows, direct values for header KPIs.

tasks.title: Create weekly automation wrapper
tasks.description: End-to-end script: detect files, update configs, extract KPIs/RCA, copy data, update PDCA, build dashboard, deploy. CLI with --week, --deploy, --skip-pdca flags.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Add April Targets gap analysis tab
tasks.description: New tab showing KPI gap gauges, projections, Pareto analysis, service gap table, and prioritized action roadmap.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Add pagination & CSV export to Milestone RCA drilldown
tasks.description: 50 records per page with pagination, plus CSV export button for completeness/timeliness missing shipment tables.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Add ETA dates, Bosch 7d reference, pagination
tasks.description: Added estimated/actual date columns, early/late breakdown, Bosch 7-day reference Pass/Fail, and pagination to ETA RCA tables.

tasks.title: Monitor ETA 2P volatility
tasks.description: ETA 2P is on track (66.7% vs 75% target) but volatile week-over-week. Monitor for consistency and port congestion impact.

tasks.title: SC4 S50/S51 'CFS' milestones — 66+84 missing
tasks.description: Received origin CFS and Arrived destination CFS milestones have significant gaps. Review CFS integration for SC4 shipments.
